subcodes.first_line: This is My remembrance of him who hath hearkened to My call, turned his face toward My countenance, spoken forth My praise, and acknowledged that which hath been ordained by God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری من سمع ندائی و اقبل الی وجهی و نطق بثنائی و اقر بما امر من لدی الله
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
